caveats: Consumer and test matching is static and method/path based; unclassified runtime-computed URLs require manual review.
Parameter names are normalized during matching, so /:id and /:invoiceId are treated as the same shape.
A missing frontend callsite does not prove an endpoint is unused; external, mobile, automation, and stale consumers may exist.
Recommended dispositions are starting points, not approved schema design.

operations.dispositionReason: State-changing operation suitable for a GraphQL mutation pending semantic review.
operations.notes: Implemented behind the default-off calendar definition-mutation flag. Delete and retained booking writes acquire the shared booking-namespace advisory lock before row locks or inserts, booking creation rechecks the calendar after that lock, and delete rejects pending or confirmed future bookings before cascade. Fresh PostgreSQL proves the concurrent retained-create-versus-GraphQL-delete race plus blocked, foreign, no-CSRF, allowed-cancelled-history, cascade, and REST-readback cases; the browser rollback gate remains open.

operations.dispositionReason: State-changing operation suitable for a GraphQL mutation pending semantic review.
operations.notes: Resume only an explicitly paused enrollment while its organization-owned workflow is active; deactivation pauses resume through workflow activation instead.

operations.dispositionReason: State-changing operation suitable for a GraphQL mutation pending semantic review.
operations.notes: Retry only a failed enrollment under an active tenant-owned workflow, preserving current_step so completed steps are not replayed.

operations.dispositionReason: Read operation suitable for a GraphQL query pending semantic review.
operations.notes: Return tenant-scoped enrollment and provider-outbox status/type counts, queue age, due/expired work, attempts, cancellations, dead letters, and operator retry totals without payloads, destinations, headers, or idempotency keys.

operations.dispositionReason: Read operation suitable for a GraphQL query pending semantic review.
operations.notes: Strictly paginate and filter the tenant-owned provider queue. Expose safe status/timing/attempt/error fields and provider correlation IDs while omitting serialized payloads and delivery secrets.

operations.dispositionReason: State-changing operation suitable for a GraphQL mutation pending semantic review.
operations.notes: Resolve only a tenant/workflow-owned SMS attempt in reconciliation_required. A valid Twilio message SID records provider acceptance and a correlated SMS log; resend is an explicit operator authorization that retains reconciliation and retry history.

operations.dispositionReason: State-changing operation suitable for a GraphQL mutation pending semantic review.
operations.notes: Retry only a tenant/workflow-owned non-cancelled dead letter whose enrollment is not cancelled. Reset the delivery attempt cycle while retaining operator retry count and timestamp.
